desc: AV Aureus. Rome mint. GALLIENVS AVG, laureate cuirassed bust left, seen from front / DEO AVGVSTO, laureate head of Divus Augustus right, with features of Gallienus. Cohen 148. Text
AV aureus, Rome. Sole reign. IMP GALLIENVS AVG, helmeted, cuirassed bust left, holding spear and shield / FIDES MILITVM, Fides standing left, holding two standards. RIC 10; Cohen 2
AV aureus, Siscia. 19mm, 4,56 g. Sole reign. AD 266. GALLIENVS AVG, head left, wreathed with corn / FIDES MIL, Fides standing front, looking right, holding standard in each hand. R
AV Heavy Aureus. Rome mint, Sole reign. 262 AD. GALLIENVS AVG, laureate head left / FIDES-MILI-TVM, inscription in three lines within imperial wreath. Cohen 255, Gobl 521. Text
AV aureus, sole reign. GALLIENVS PF AVG, head left, crowned with reeds / VBIQVE PAX, Victory in biga right. RIC 72; Cohen 1018. Text
AV Aureus, 264-267 AD, Rome. GALLIENAE AVGVSTAE, head left wearing wreath of reeds / VBIQVE PAX, Victory in biga right. Cohen 1015; RIC 74. Sole Reign. Text
[j] Gallienus, AV aureus. Joint Reign, Rome, AD 253-254. 2.68 g. IMP C P LIC GALLIENVS AVG, laureate, cuirassed bust right / LAETITIA AVGG, Laetitia standing left, holding wreath a

AV aureus, Rome mint, sole reign. GALLIENVS AVG, radiate, cuirassed bust right / VICTORIA AVG III, Victory walking left, holding wreath and palm. T in left field. RIC V-I, 84. Text
[j] var Gallienus, AV aureus, Rome, joint reign. IMP CP LIC GALLIENVS AVG, laureate, draped, cuirassed bust right / LIBERTAS AVGG, Libertas standing left, holding pileus and sceptr
AV aureus, Rome. Sole reign. GALLIENVS AVG, radiate head right / VOTIS X in three lines within laurel wreath. RIC 93. Text
AV Aureus, Rome mint, sole reign. GALLIENVS AVG, radiate head right / VOT X ET XX in four lines within wreath. RIC V-I Rome 95. Text
